name: @figma-forge/core
description: Bridge Server for Figma Forge — MCP + WebSocket + REST API

scripts.copy-plugin: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const src=p.resolve(__dirname,'../plugin');const dest=p.resolve(__dirname,'dist/plugin');if(!fs.existsSync(src)){console.log('⚠️  Plugin source not found, skipping');process.exit(0);}fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true});const copies=[['manifest.json','manifest.json'],['ui.html','ui.html'],['dist/code.js','dist/code.js']];for(const[s,d]of copies){const sp=p.join(src,s);const dp=p.join(dest,d);fs.mkdirSync(p.dirname(dp),{recursive:true});if(fs.existsSync(sp)){fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp);}}console.log('✅ Plugin files copied to dist/plugin/')"
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm build && pnpm build:cli && pnpm copy-plugin
